title: Device Home Screen - Connecting multiple headsets
scenario: Device home screen fails to display all connected headsets and allow swipe navigation when multiple devices (2-3) are paired and connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Pair and connect 2 or 3 Poly Bluetooth headsets to the Android device
Navigate to the Home screen of the app
Observe the device carousel at the top of the Home screen
Check the dots at the bottom of the device carousel indicating the number of connected devices
Swipe left on the device carousel
Swipe right on the device carousel
expected: The Home screen displays all connected devices in a carousel. Dots at the bottom indicate the number of connected devices and which device is currently displayed. The user can swipe left or right to navigate between each connected device.
